ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Reference to the player's position */,
  "team" INTEGER /* Reference to the player's team */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Unique number on the player's jersey */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "years_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the player has been in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "snaps" INTEGER /* Number of snaps the player participated in */,
  "targets" INTEGER /* Number of times the player was targeted for a pass */,
  "completions" INTEGER /* Number of completions by the player */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained by the player */,
  "yards_after_catch" INTEGER /* Yards gained after catching the ball */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns scored by the player */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions thrown by the player */,
  "rating" REAL /* Player's performance rating for the game */,
  "drops" INTEGER /* Number of dropped passes by the player */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of times the player fumbled the ball */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks by the player */,
  "pass_defended" INTEGER /* Number of passes defended by the player */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Yards gained from rushing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position's role */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary for players in this position */,
  "typical_role" TEXT /* Typical role and responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division within the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, player) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique number on the player's jersey
Number of years the player has been in the league

Number of snaps the player participated in
Number of times the player was targeted for a pass
Number of completions by the player
